title: Smoke-Hot Venezuelan Rice Noodles
description: A garlicky and shattering Venezuelan dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles, ovo-vegetarian and friendly to those who love a little heat.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chili peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and cumin, and stir to combine.
Add the rice vermicelli and beef broth, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 8-10 minutes, or until the noodles are cooked through.
Serve the noodles hot, garnished with additional chili peppers and a sprinkle of smoked paprika, if desired.
Cook time can be adjusted based on personal preference for doneness.
To add more heat, additional chili peppers can be added to the dish.
